statement: In every magma, Equation 2202 (`x = ((y * z) * z) * (y * w)`) implies Equation 134 (`x = y * ((z * x) * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0879
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y z) z) (op y w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op z x) x))
